learnings.learning: PCIe power management states allow a device to efficiently manage energy consumption by trading off power savings against the time required to resume activity. These states range from the fully operational L0 state to the deeply powered-down L2 state, which offers the highest power savings but requires the longest wake-up time
learnings.articleTitle: Power Management States in the context of PCIe

learnings.learning: In Islamic belief, Qada’ represents the actual unfolding of life events that can be altered through sincere supplication and action. However, any such change is already fully known to Allah and preordained within His complete, eternal plan of Qadr
learnings.articleTitle: The Art of Qada’ and Qadr

learnings.learning: In Islamic beliefs, the purpose of human life revolves around worshiping Allah, serving as stewards of the Earth to preserve faith and unity, and preparing for the eternal Hereafter. This framework teaches that earthly life is a temporary test of conduct where every action carries personal accountability and shapes one's eternal outcome

A data analysis of the Quran reveals that its top 20 most repeated words account for approximately 20.83% of the text, meaning they do not satisfy the Pareto 80/20 principle. Despite this, mastering these specific words remains the recommended starting point for beginners trying to learn Quranic Arabic
learnings.articleTitle: Top 20 Words to Understand the Quran: A Data Analysis using Python

learnings.learning: Scrum is an agile approach that breaks the development process into iterative cycles called Sprints to allow for greater flexibility and quicker adjustments. It relies on three specific roles, three artifacts to ensure transparency, and three structured ceremonies to keep the team aligned and continuously improving
